headline: BJC HealthCare Selects Innovaccer to Accelerate its Value-Based Care and Population Health Management Strategy
summary: BJC HealthCare has announced its selection of the Innovaccer data platform to unify patient data from disparate sources, including its new Epic electronic health record (EHR) and external claims data. The goal is to create a unified patient record to support population health management, enhance value-based care initiatives, improve care coordination, and drive digital transformation. This platform will provide analytics and workflows for BJC's accountable care organization (ACO) and other value-based care programs.
recommended_action: Review award for BJC HealthCare. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Ryan Grace.

headline: Population Health and Care Management Platform
summary: This was a solicitation (RFP #UCDHS-Sourcing-23-1004) for a comprehensive Population Health and Care Management Platform. The solution required capabilities for data aggregation from various clinical and claims sources, analytics, patient risk stratification, care coordination workflows, and patient engagement tools to support UC Davis Health's value-based care strategy. A notice of intent to award the contract to Innovaccer, Inc. was subsequently posted.
recommended_action: Review intent_to_award for University Of California Health. Deadline: N/A (Awarded). Coordinate response with Baz Patel.

headline: BJC HealthCare, Saint Luke’s Health System Expand Partnership with Unite Us to Address Social Determinants of Health
summary: This is a vendor selection announcement detailing BJC HealthCare's expansion of its partnership with Unite Us and its acquired NowPow platform. The initiative aims to build a coordinated care network to address social determinants of health by connecting clinical settings with social service organizations, which is a core function of modern care management and population health platforms.
recommended_action: Review award for BJC HealthCare. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Ryan Grace.

headline: UCSF Enterprise Data & Analytics Platform RFI
summary: UCSF issued a Request for Information (RFI) to gather information from vendors regarding an Enterprise Data & Analytics Platform. The goal is to understand the market for unified, scalable, and secure platforms for data ingestion, storage, processing, governance, and analytics that can support the entire UCSF enterprise, including its clinical, research, and educational missions.
recommended_action: Review RFI for University Of California Health. Deadline: 2024-03-11T17:00:00PST. Coordinate response with Baz Patel.

headline: BJC IT Staff Augmentation Services RFP
summary: BJC HealthCare has issued a Request for Proposal (RFP) to solicit proposals from qualified firms to provide IT Staff Augmentation Services. This involves supplying temporary, skilled IT professionals on an as-needed basis to support various technology projects and departments within the BJC system. While not a platform purchase, this indicates active project work which could involve enterprise data, clinical applications, and population health initiatives.
recommended_action: Review RFP for BJC HealthCare. Deadline: 2024-05-24T17:00:00Z. Coordinate response with Ryan Grace.

headline: Walgreens and In-Step Announce First-of-its-Kind Patient Data Platform to Speed Drug Development
summary: Walgreens and health tech company In-Step are launching a large-scale, real-world patient data platform. The platform will leverage Walgreens' extensive de-identified patient data to help life sciences companies accelerate clinical trials and drug development. This initiative focuses on creating a robust clinical data repository and integration platform to improve trial design, recruitment, and evidence generation.
recommended_action: Review award for Walgreens. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Jay Levine.

headline: UC PPO Care and Condition Management Program
summary: Request for Information (RFI) to solicit information from vendors about their care and condition management programs and related services for potential future support of the UC Preferred Provider Organization (PPO) health plans.
recommended_action: Review RFI for University Of California Health. Deadline: 2023-02-27. Coordinate response with Baz Patel.

headline: UCDH RFI - Population Health Management Platform
summary: The University of California, Davis Health issued a Request for Information (RFI) to gather information from qualified firms for a comprehensive Population Health Management (PHM) platform. The platform is intended to support value-based care initiatives and should include functionalities like data aggregation from various sources (including Epic EHR), financial and clinical analytics, risk stratification, care management workflows, and patient engagement tools.
recommended_action: Review RFI for University Of California Health. Deadline: 2024-05-10T17:00:00PST. Coordinate response with Baz Patel.

headline: Universal Health Services Selects Holon Solutions to Deliver Critical Patient Insights at the Point of Care
summary: This is a vendor selection announcement. UHS has chosen Holon Solutions' CollaborNet® platform to deliver critical patient insights from various sources directly into the clinician's workflow within their Cerner EHR. The goal is to provide a comprehensive view of a patient's health, close care gaps, and enable better care management decisions at the point of care.
recommended_action: Review award for Universal Health Services. Deadline: Not Applicable. Coordinate response with Jay Levine.

headline: Single Source - Explorys Platform - C111226
summary: This is a single source procurement notice for the Explorys Platform, which provides Mount Sinai with access to a large, de-identified electronic health record database. The data is used for longitudinal and standardized analysis to support population health and research initiatives.
recommended_action: Review award for Mount Sinai Health System. Deadline: 2024-05-15. Coordinate response with Joseph Thompson.

headline: Kaiser Permanente Selects Microsoft Cloud and AI for Digital Health Platform Modernization
summary: Kaiser Permanente announced a major cloud transformation initiative, partnering with Accenture and Microsoft. The goal is to migrate its digital health platform and data infrastructure to Microsoft Azure. This strategic move is intended to enhance data integration, leverage advanced analytics and AI, improve patient care access, and streamline operations. While this is a vendor selection announcement and not an active RFP, it signifies a massive overhaul of their enterprise data platform, clinical data repository, and population health capabilities, suggesting potential future opportunities for ancillary services and integrated solutions.
recommended_action: Review award for Kaiser Permanente. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Baz Patel.

headline: Jefferson Health Selects Concert Health to Expand Access to Behavioral Health Services through Primary Care
summary: This is a vendor selection announcement. Jefferson Health has chosen Concert Health to implement a Collaborative Care Model, integrating behavioral health services directly within its primary care settings. Concert Health will provide care managers and psychiatric consultants to help primary care physicians treat patients with anxiety and depression, effectively acting as a specialized care management and population health solution for behavioral health.
recommended_action: Review award for Jefferson Health. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Jay Levine.

headline: CommonSpirit Health Selects Palantir to Build the Health System's First Enterprise Data and Analytics Platform
summary: This is a vendor selection and partnership announcement, not an active RFP. CommonSpirit Health has selected Palantir Technologies Inc. to build its first enterprise-wide data and analytics platform. The multi-year partnership aims to integrate siloed clinical, operational, and financial data into a unified platform (Palantir Foundry). The goal is to improve patient care, operational efficiency, and build a foundation for advanced analytics and population health initiatives.
recommended_action: Review award for Commonspirit Health. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Jay Levine.

headline: Baylor Scott & White Health and Contigo Health to Launch New Health Plan for North Texas Employers
summary: This is a partnership and vendor selection announcement. Baylor Scott & White Health has partnered with Contigo Health to create and launch a new health plan called 'Connected Care.' The initiative requires significant technology infrastructure to support a coordinated, high-touch member experience, directly implying the selection of platforms for care management, data integration, and population health management to support the new plan's operations.
recommended_action: Review award for Baylor Scott & White Health. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with John Hickey.

headline: Care Management Platform RFI
summary: Banner Health issued a Request for Information (RFI) to identify and evaluate potential vendors for a comprehensive Care Management Platform. The objective was to find a solution to support value-based care initiatives, including care coordination, utilization management, and patient engagement. Key requirements included seamless integration with their Cerner EHR, robust data analytics, and capabilities for population health management.
recommended_action: Review RFI for Banner Health. Deadline: Closed Q3 2023. Coordinate response with Baz Patel.

headline: AdventHealth Extends Oracle Health EHR and Adds Cloud ERP to Unify Operations
summary: AdventHealth announced a major extension of its collaboration with Oracle Health, unifying its system by adding Oracle Health's EHR to 17 more of its hospitals. This move consolidates the health system onto a single, integrated platform for both clinical and financial data, impacting their core clinical data repository, data integration strategy, and enterprise resource planning.
recommended_action: Review award for AdventHealth. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with John Hickey.

headline: NewYork-Presbyterian Selects Volpara Health for Enterprise Breast Density Assessment Software
summary: NewYork-Presbyterian announced its selection and implementation of Volpara Health's AI-powered breast density assessment software across its enterprise. The technology is intended to standardize density assessments, improve breast cancer risk evaluation, and streamline patient and provider reporting.
recommended_action: Review award for Newyork-Presbyterian Healthcare System. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Jay Levine.

headline: Enterprise Master Patient Index (EMPI) Solution
summary: UNC Health issued a Request for Information (RFI) to gather information from vendors on available Enterprise Master Patient Index (EMPI) solutions. The goal is to support an enterprise-wide, single, and best patient record to improve patient safety, care quality, and operational efficiency by linking patient data across disparate systems. This is a foundational step for larger data platform and analytics initiatives.
recommended_action: Review RFI for UNC Health. Deadline: 2024-02-23. Coordinate response with John Hickey.

headline: Data Integration Platform
summary: Presbyterian Healthcare Services (PHS) issued a Request for Proposal for a comprehensive Data Integration Platform. The objective was to enhance and streamline data ingestion from disparate sources, including EHRs, claims data, and third-party systems, to support their enterprise data warehouse (EDW) and advanced analytics initiatives. Key requirements included real-time data streaming capabilities, robust data quality and governance features, and a scalable architecture to replace or augment existing ETL processes.
recommended_action: Review RFP for Presbyterian Healthcare Services. Deadline: 2022-10-28. Coordinate response with Baz Patel.

headline: Sutter Health to Deploy Abridge's Generative AI for Clinical Documentation System-Wide
summary: This is a vendor selection and implementation announcement. Sutter Health has selected and will deploy Abridge's generative AI platform across its entire health system. The technology, which will be integrated into Sutter's Epic electronic health record (EHR), is designed to reduce administrative burden on clinicians by automatically drafting clinical notes from conversations with patients. This initiative falls under healthcare IT and involves clinical data processing and integration.
recommended_action: Review award for Sutter Health. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Baz Patel.

headline: Bon Secours Mercy Health Selects the Innovaccer Health Cloud to Advance Its Population Health and Value-Based Care Strategy
summary: This is a vendor selection and partnership announcement, not an active solicitation. Bon Secours Mercy Health (BSMH) chose Innovaccer's Health Cloud platform to unify patient data from multiple EHRs and other IT systems into a single, unified patient record. The platform will be used to generate insights and automate workflows for their population health management and value-based care programs, covering over 1 million patients.
recommended_action: Review award for Bon Secours Mercy Health. Deadline: Not Applicable. Coordinate response with Joseph Thompson.

headline: Memorial Hermann Extends Relationship with Oracle Health for Electronic Health Record (EHR) System
summary: Memorial Hermann Health System announced a 10-year extension of its agreement with Oracle Health for its electronic health record (EHR) system. This represents a significant contract renewal for a core clinical data platform. The initiative focuses on enhancing clinical efficiency, improving the patient and provider experience, and leveraging cloud capabilities to support integrated data and analytics for care management and population health.
recommended_action: Review award for Memorial Hermann Health System. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with John Hickey.

headline: Selection of Epic Payer Platform for Payer-Provider Collaboration
summary: Corewell Health has selected Epic's Payer Platform to create a more integrated data system between its provider operations and its health plan, Priority Health. The initiative aims to streamline prior authorizations, improve care coordination, and support population health management by sharing data more efficiently between the payer and provider.
recommended_action: Review award for Corewell Health. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Joseph Thompson.

headline: Request for Proposals (RFP): LPCA Care Management and Population Health Management Platform
summary: LPCA is seeking proposals from qualified vendors to provide a comprehensive Care Management (CM) and Population Health Management (PHM) platform. This platform will serve LPCA’s member Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs) to enhance patient care coordination, manage chronic diseases, improve health outcomes, and support value-based care initiatives. The desired solution should integrate with various Electronic Health Record (EHR) systems, provide robust data analytics and reporting capabilities, and offer tools for care planning, patient engagement, and risk stratification.
recommended_action: Review RFP for Louisiana Primary Care Association. Deadline: April 12, 2024. Coordinate response with John Hickey.

headline: Notice of Intent to Award - Care Management Platform (RFP HCLA 22-01)
summary: This is a notice of intent to award a contract to ZeOmega, Inc. for the provision of a Care Management Platform. The procurement originated from RFP HCLA 22-01, which sought a comprehensive platform to support HCLA's care management programs for its members.
recommended_action: Review intent_to_award for Health Care LA IPA. Deadline: N/A (Awarded). Coordinate response with Baz Patel.

account_name: Horizon Blue Cross Blue Shield Of New Jersey
headline: Horizon Blue Cross Blue Shield of New Jersey Selects Abacus Insights to Power New Data Platform
summary: Horizon BCBSNJ announced its selection of Abacus Insights to build and manage a new, unified enterprise data platform. The platform is designed to ingest and consolidate data from multiple sources—including claims, clinical, and administrative systems—to create a single source of truth. This initiative aims to enhance analytics capabilities, improve member health outcomes, and support population health and care management programs.
recommended_action: Review award for Horizon Blue Cross Blue Shield Of New Jersey. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Lisa Lehtinen.

headline: Request for Proposal (RFP) For D-SNP Care Management Platform
summary: VillageCareMAX is seeking proposals from qualified vendors for a comprehensive Care Management Platform to support its Dual Eligible Special Needs Plan (D-SNP) line of business. The platform must include functionalities for care planning, assessments, service authorizations, care coordination, and robust data integration capabilities with existing systems.
recommended_action: Review RFP for VillageCareMAX. Deadline: 2023-12-08. Coordinate response with Alexander J. Keltner.

headline: The Health Plan Partners With ZeOmega to Improve Member Health Outcomes
summary: The Health Plan (THP) announced it has selected and implemented the Jiva platform from ZeOmega to serve as its new care management platform. The platform is intended to streamline care management, utilization management, and population health management to improve member health outcomes. While this is an award notice from late 2021, it provides key intelligence on the incumbent vendor and platform, suggesting a potential contract renewal or rebid opportunity in the coming years.
recommended_action: Review award for The Health Plan. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with John Specht.

headline: Award Notice: Digital Transformation and Mainframe Modernization Services
summary: Mutual of Omaha has selected NTT DATA for a multi-year engagement to accelerate its digital transformation. The project involves modernizing the company's mainframe application portfolio and transitioning to a modern, cloud-based platform on AWS to improve speed-to-market and enable new digital capabilities.
recommended_action: Review award for Mutual of Omaha Insurance Company. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Hannah Schuyler.

headline: Contract with ZeOmega, Inc. for a Care Management Platform
summary: This is an award notice from the Hennepin County Board of Commissioners to approve a contract with ZeOmega, Inc. to provide a Software as a Service (SaaS) Care Management Platform for Hennepin Health. The solution is intended to support key functional areas including Utilization Management, Case Management, and Disease Management. The original RFP (H6321-HH) was issued in April 2023.
recommended_action: Review award for Hennepin Health. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with David Kaskoun.

account_name: Group Health Cooperative of South Central Wisconsin
headline: Request for Proposal for Enterprise Data Warehouse and Population Health Management Platform
summary: A 2017 request for proposals seeking a vendor to provide and implement an integrated Enterprise Data Warehouse (EDW) and Population Health Management (PHM) platform. The goal was to replace their existing data warehouse and add capabilities for advanced analytics, risk stratification, care management, and quality reporting to support value-based care initiatives. The subsequent contract was awarded to Epic Systems for its Cogito and Healthy Planet modules.
recommended_action: Review RFP for Group Health Cooperative of South Central Wisconsin. Deadline: April 28, 2017. Coordinate response with David Kaskoun.

headline: EmblemHealth and Cityblock Expand Partnership To Bring Integrated Care To Medicaid Members
summary: EmblemHealth announced an expanded partnership with Cityblock Health to provide comprehensive, integrated, community-based care for its Medicaid members. This collaboration focuses on a value-based care model, addressing both clinical needs and social drivers of health, which is directly related to care management and population health management platforms and services.
recommended_action: Review award for Emblemhealth. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with John Specht.

headline: Request for Proposal (RFP) for Care Management Platform
summary: South Country Health Alliance (SCHA) issued an RFP seeking a comprehensive Care Management Platform to support its care coordination and case management activities. Key requirements included member stratification, assessments, care plan development, task management, reporting, and robust integration capabilities with existing systems. A subsequent award to vendor ZeOmega was approved during the SCHA Board of Directors meeting on December 20, 2023.
recommended_action: Review RFP for South Country Health Alliance. Deadline: 2023-08-11T16:00:00Z. Coordinate response with David Kaskoun.

account_name: Physicians Health Plan Of Northern Indiana
headline: Physicians Health Plan of Northern Indiana (PHPNI) Selects ZeOmega’s Jiva Platform for Integrated Care Management
summary: This is a vendor selection and contract award announcement from October 2021. PHPNI selected ZeOmega's Jiva platform to serve as its new care management solution. The platform is intended to help PHPNI streamline and automate core processes, including population health management, utilization management, appeals and grievances, and care transitions. While this RFP process is complete, the contract's age may indicate a future rebid or renewal opportunity.
recommended_action: Review award for Physicians Health Plan Of Northern Indiana. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with David Kaskoun.

headline: Novartis Adopts Medidata Rave Omics to Accelerate Groundbreaking Research and Development of Next Generation Therapeutics
summary: This is a vendor selection announcement. Novartis has selected and is standardizing on Medidata's Rave Omics platform for the ingestion, aggregation, and analysis of high-throughput omics data alongside traditional clinical trial patient data. The platform serves as a centralized clinical data repository to support drug discovery and development.
recommended_action: Review award for Novartis. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Shyam Dattani.

account_name: Neighborhood Health Plan Of Rhode Island
headline: Neighborhood Health Plan of Rhode Island Selects Bamboo Health for Real-Time Care Coordination
summary: This is a vendor selection announcement. Neighborhood Health Plan of Rhode Island (NHPRI) has implemented Bamboo Health's Pings solution, a real-time care coordination platform. The solution provides Admission, Discharge, and Transfer (ADT) data notifications to NHPRI's care managers to enable timely patient support, improve care transitions, and reduce hospital readmissions. This initiative falls under care management and population health management.
recommended_action: Review award for Neighborhood Health Plan Of Rhode Island. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Alexander J. Keltner.

headline: Notice of Intent to Award a Contract - HPSJ RFP No. 23-01 Data Management & Analytics Platform Solution
summary: This is a notice of intent to award the contract for RFP No. 23-01, which sought a comprehensive Data Management and Analytics Platform. The solution was intended to support data ingestion, integration, an enterprise data warehouse/lakehouse, governance, and analytics for functions including population health management and quality improvement. The intended awardee is KPI Sense, Inc.
recommended_action: Review intent_to_award for Health Plan of San Joaquin. Deadline: N/A (Notice issued July 28, 2023). Coordinate response with Michael Rime.

headline: MVP Health Care Selects ZeOmega's Jiva Platform for Integrated Care Management
summary: This is a vendor selection announcement. MVP Health Care has selected and is implementing the Jiva platform from ZeOmega to serve as its new, unified solution for care management and population health management. The platform aims to consolidate various functions like utilization management, case management, and disease management, replacing a legacy system to create a more holistic view of its members.
recommended_action: Review award for MVP Health Care. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with John Specht.

headline: Daiichi Sankyo and ConcertAI Announce a New Multi-Year Collaboration to Advance Evidence Generation and Clinical Development in Oncology
summary: Daiichi Sankyo has selected ConcertAI for a multi-year collaboration to utilize its real-world data (RWD), AI technology, and Digital Trial Solution. The partnership aims to support Daiichi Sankyo's oncology portfolio by enhancing evidence generation and optimizing clinical trial design and execution. This functions as a vendor selection announcement for a data platform and clinical data services.
recommended_action: Review award for Daiichi Sankyo. Deadline: Not Applicable. Coordinate response with Shyam Dattani.

headline: CSL Behring Adopts Veeva Vault Clinical Suite to Streamline Trial Processes
summary: CSL Behring, a global biotherapeutics leader, has adopted the Veeva Vault Clinical Suite, including eTMF, CTMS, and Study Startup applications. The objective was to create a unified, single source of truth for clinical trial data and processes, replacing multiple disparate systems to increase efficiency, visibility, and compliance across their global studies.
recommended_action: Review award for CSL Behring. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Gina Black.

headline: Otsuka and Holmusk Announce Collaboration to Use Real-World Evidence to Improve Behavioral Health
summary: This is an announcement of a vendor selection and collaboration. Otsuka has selected Holmusk to co-develop a digital health platform to support patients and clinicians in managing serious mental illness (SMI). The collaboration will leverage Holmusk's flagship real-world evidence platform, NeuroBlu, which contains longitudinal data from a large behavioral health electronic health record (EHR) system.
recommended_action: Review award for Otsuka Pharmaceutical. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Gina Black.

headline: Aigenpulse Collaborates With Boehringer Ingelheim to Streamline Drug Discovery & Development
summary: Boehringer Ingelheim selected Aigenpulse to implement its CytoML Experiment Suite. The goal is to create a unified, GxP-compliant data and analysis platform for complex flow cytometry data from preclinical and clinical studies, integrating disparate data sources to improve decision-making in drug discovery.
recommended_action: Review award for Boehringer Ingelheim. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Gina Black.

headline: Organon Selects Veeva as Commercial Technology Foundation Partner for CRM, Data, and Analytics
summary: This is a vendor selection announcement. Organon, a new global healthcare company, has selected Veeva Systems to establish its core commercial technology foundation. The partnership includes the adoption of Veeva CRM, Veeva Link, Veeva OpenData, and Veeva Nitro. Veeva Nitro is a commercial data warehouse platform for the life sciences industry, directly addressing the user's query for 'enterprise data warehouse' and 'data integration platform'. This establishes the foundational data and analytics infrastructure for Organon's commercial operations following its spinoff from Merck.
recommended_action: Review award for Organon. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Gina Black.

headline: Intent to Award Notification - RFP 24005 – Enterprise Data Platform
summary: CenCal Health has posted a notice of its intent to award a contract to Cozeva for its Enterprise Data Platform (EDP). The original RFP sought proposals for a modern solution to replace the organization's legacy data warehouse. The new platform is intended to provide enhanced data integration, management, advanced analytics, and reporting capabilities to support various health plan functions.
recommended_action: Review intent_to_award for CenCal Health. Deadline: May 24, 2024 (Proposal Deadline - Closed). Coordinate response with Michael Rime.

account_name: Blue Cross Of Idaho Health Service
headline: Blue Cross of Idaho Partners with Vim to Enhance Provider Experience and Power Value-Based Care Performance
summary: Blue Cross of Idaho announced it has selected and partnered with Vim, a point-of-care connection platform, to power its provider enablement strategy. The partnership aims to deliver enhanced data and workflow tools directly into provider EHR workflows, connecting real-time data from BCI's systems to support value-based care initiatives and provide actionable insights at the point of care.
recommended_action: Review award for Blue Cross Of Idaho Health Service. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Michael Rime.

headline: Request for Proposal - Enterprise Data Platform and Services
summary: HPSM is seeking proposals for a modern, cloud-based enterprise data platform to replace its legacy data warehouse. The solution should support data integration (ETL), advanced analytics, reporting, and population health management initiatives. The scope includes a data lake, enterprise data warehouse (EDW), and business intelligence (BI) capabilities.
recommended_action: Review RFP for Health Plan Of San Mateo. Deadline: January 17, 2024. Coordinate response with Michael Rime.

headline: GSK and Tempus Announce Multi-Year Collaboration to Improve Clinical Trial Design, Accelerate Enrollment, and Identify Novel Drug Targets
summary: GSK has entered a multi-year collaboration with Tempus, a leader in artificial intelligence and precision medicine. GSK will gain access to Tempus' AI-enabled platform and its library of de-identified clinical and molecular patient data. The partnership aims to enhance GSK's R&D success rate by improving clinical trial design, accelerating patient enrollment, and identifying novel drug targets.
estimated_value: $70 million upfront payment, with additional milestone payments and options.
recommended_action: Review award for GSK. Deadline: Not Applicable (Awarded). Coordinate response with Shyam Dattani.

headline: GEHA Selects Ontrak Health as New Medical Management/Care Management Partner
summary: GEHA has selected and awarded a contract to Ontrak Health to implement a new platform for case management, disease management, and utilization management for its medical plan members. The go-live date for the new platform is scheduled for January 1, 2025.
recommended_action: Review award for Geha. Deadline: N/A (Contract Awarded). Coordinate response with Hannah Schuyler.

headline: Community Health Plan of Washington Selects Cedar Gate for Enterprise-Wide Value-Based Care Performance Management
summary: CHPW announced it has selected Cedar Gate's unified provider-payer platform to advance its value-based care strategy. The platform will provide advanced analytics for population health, care management, and tools for managing bundled payments and other alternative payment models.
recommended_action: Review award for Community Health Plan Of Washington. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Michael Rime.

headline: Population Health, Care Management and Utilization Management Platform
summary: Colorado Access is soliciting proposals from qualified vendors to provide a Population Health, Care Management and Utilization Management Platform. The goal is to acquire a comprehensive and integrated solution to support these core functions for their members.
recommended_action: Review RFP for Colorado Access. Deadline: 2024-06-21T17:00:00-06:00. Coordinate response with Hannah Schuyler.

headline: Expanded Partnership to Scale AI-powered Clinical Data Platform
summary: Pfizer announced an expanded partnership with Saama Technologies to further develop and scale its modern, AI-powered clinical data platform. This builds on a prior collaboration to create a unified platform for clinical trial data review and analysis, aiming to accelerate drug development timelines.
recommended_action: Review award for Pfizer. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Shyam Dattani.

headline: SOPHiA GENETICS and Bristol Myers Squibb Expand Collaboration to Analyze Molecular Profiling Data from Clinical Trial Participants
summary: Bristol Myers Squibb has expanded its existing collaboration with SOPHiA GENETICS to leverage its cloud-based DDM™ data analytics platform. The platform will be used to analyze multimodal data, including genomics, from clinical trial participants to generate insights for drug development and patient stratification.
recommended_action: Review award for Bristol Myers Squibb. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Shyam Dattani.

account_name: Blue Cross Blue Shield Of Arizona
headline: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Arizona and ConsejoSano Partner to Improve Maternal Health Equity for Multicultural Members
summary: This is a partnership announcement indicating a recent vendor selection. BCBSAZ has selected ConsejoSano, a multicultural patient engagement solution, to provide culturally and linguistically tailored support to pregnant and postpartum members to address health disparities. This initiative is a core component of a population health management and care management strategy.
recommended_action: Review award for Blue Cross Blue Shield Of Arizona. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Michael Rime.

account_name: Blue Cross And Blue Shield Of North Carolina
headline: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of North Carolina and Google Cloud to Create New Enterprise Data and Analytics Platform
summary: BCBSNC announced a multi-year collaboration with Google Cloud to build a new enterprise data and analytics platform. This strategic initiative is designed to enable a more seamless, personalized healthcare experience for members by leveraging cloud technologies for data consolidation, interoperability, and advanced analytics.
recommended_action: Review award for Blue Cross And Blue Shield Of North Carolina. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with Lisa Lehtinen.

account_name: Blue Cross & Blue Shield Of Rhode Island
headline: Blue Cross & Blue Shield of Rhode Island Selects Coalesce for Data Transformation
summary: BCBSRI announced it has selected and implemented the Coalesce data transformation platform to run on the Snowflake Data Cloud. This initiative aims to automate and scale the insurer's data management processes, accelerate the development of data products for analytics, and improve data governance across their enterprise data warehouse.
recommended_action: Review award for Blue Cross & Blue Shield Of Rhode Island. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with Alexander J. Keltner.

account_name: Arkansas Blue Cross And Blue Shield
headline: Arkansas Blue Cross and Blue Shield Taps HealthVerity for Real-World Data Insights on Critical Illnesses
summary: This is an announcement of a vendor selection and partnership. Arkansas Blue Cross and Blue Shield selected HealthVerity to use its IPGE platform for access to de-identified, real-world data (RWD), including claims, pharmacy, lab, and other data. The goal is to generate deeper insights into member populations with critical illnesses to support value-based care initiatives.
recommended_action: Review award for Arkansas Blue Cross And Blue Shield. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with John Specht.

headline: Elevance Health to Redefine Personalized Healthcare Experiences at Scale with the Databricks Lakehouse Platform
summary: This is a vendor selection announcement. Elevance Health has selected the Databricks Lakehouse Platform to unify its data and AI capabilities. The initiative is focused on building predictive models and delivering personalized, proactive healthcare insights. This strategic move directly impacts their enterprise data platform, data integration, and population health management infrastructure.
recommended_action: Review award for Elevance Health. Deadline: N/A. Coordinate response with John Specht.

headline: Amida Care Selects ZeOmega's Jiva Platform for Integrated Health Care Management
summary: Following an extensive RFP process in 2022 for a Care Management and Population Health IT Platform, Amida Care has selected and announced ZeOmega's Jiva platform as its new population health management solution. The platform is intended to enhance integrated care management, utilization management, member engagement, and advanced analytics.
recommended_action: Review award for Amida Care. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with John Specht.

headline: Enterprise Data Warehouse and Business Intelligence Platform
summary: Vaya Health issued a Request for Proposals (RFP) to solicit proposals from qualified vendors for a comprehensive Enterprise Data Warehouse (EDW) and Business Intelligence (BI) Platform. The desired solution is intended to integrate data from disparate sources (including clinical, claims, and operational data) to support Vaya's analytics, reporting, quality improvement, population health management, and value-based care initiatives.
recommended_action: Review RFP for Vaya Health. Deadline: 2023-05-12T17:00:00Z. Coordinate response with Alexander J. Keltner.

headline: Award Notice: RFP 24-06 Enterprise Data and Analytics Platform
summary: This is an award notice for a contract with Clearsense, LLC, dated March 15, 2024. The original RFP solicited proposals for a modern, scalable, and secure Enterprise Data and Analytics Platform to support data-driven decision-making, clinical research, and operational efficiency across the cancer center.
recommended_action: Review award for Roswell Park Comprehensive Cancer Center. Deadline: 2023-09-22. Coordinate response with Anirudh kanwar.

headline: HCSC to Transform Care Management with Salesforce
summary: This is a vendor selection announcement detailing a strategic collaboration where HCSC will build a new care management platform using Salesforce Health Cloud. The goal is to create a holistic, real-time view of members to enable proactive and personalized care delivery. This initiative implies significant work in data integration to consolidate various data sources into the new platform.
recommended_action: Review award for Health Care Service Corporation Group. Deadline: TBD. Coordinate response with John Specht.
